hero.tagline: "The two sources from which all wealth springs are the land and the workers"
hero.subtitle: Machining • Welding • Pottery wheels • Software engineering

activities.section_subtitle: Four areas of expertise at the service of your project

machining.title: Machining
machining.description: Precision conventional machining to 1/100 mm. Turning and milling on traditional machines for one-off parts and small production runs.

welding.title: Welding
welding.description: TIG, MIG/MAG and arc welding on steel and stainless steel. Boilermaking, structural assemblies and quality finishes.

pottery.title: Pottery wheels
pottery.description: Design and sale of professional pottery wheels and accessories. French artisanal manufacturing.

engineering.title: Software engineering
engineering.description: Senior Polytechnique engineer with 15 years of experience. Custom development, R&D and AI agents to optimize your costs.

quote.tagline: "The two sources from which all wealth springs are the land and the workers"
quote.description: At COMUA, we combine artisanal craftsmanship and technical expertise to bring your projects to life.

cta.heading: Have a project in mind?
cta.body: Whether it's machining, welding, a pottery wheel or IT consulting, we're here to help.

shop.title: Pottery wheels

contact.title: Contact us

legal.title: Legal notice
legal.meta_description: Legal notice for the comua.fr website
legal.hosting_text: This website is hosted by Netlify, Inc.
legal.ip_text: All content (text, images, logos, videos) on the comua.fr website is protected by intellectual property law. Any reproduction, representation or distribution, in whole or in part, of the content of this website is prohibited without the prior authorization of COMUA.
legal.data_text: The information collected through the contact form is intended for COMUA and is necessary for processing your request. In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, rectify and delete your personal data. To exercise this right, contact us by
legal.cookies_text: This website uses technical cookies necessary for its proper functioning. No advertising or tracking cookies are used.
legal.liability_text: COMUA strives to ensure the accuracy of the information published on this website. However, COMUA cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness and timeliness of the information and disclaims all liability for any errors or omissions.

returns.title: Refund and return policy
returns.meta_description: Refund and return policy for products purchased on comua.fr
returns.withdrawal_text: In accordance with Article L221-18 of the French Consumer Code, you have 14 days from the receipt of your order to exercise your right of withdrawal, without having to provide a reason or pay a penalty.
returns.conditions_intro: To be accepted, the return must meet the following conditions:
returns.condition_1: The product must be returned in its original packaging, in perfect condition
returns.condition_2: The product must not have been used, modified or damaged
returns.condition_3: The return request must be sent by email within the 14-day period
returns.procedure_1: Contact us by email with your order number
returns.procedure_2: We will confirm the return procedure and shipping address
returns.procedure_3: Ship the product at your expense, by registered mail with acknowledgment of receipt
returns.procedure_4: The refund will be issued within 14 days of receiving the returned product
returns.refund_text: The refund will be issued using the same payment method used for the order. Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer.
returns.defective_text: If you receive a defective or damaged product during shipping, contact us within 48 hours of receipt. We will cover the return and replacement of the product.
returns.contact_text: For any questions regarding a return or refund, contact us:

error404.title: Page not found
error404.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
